description: Transaction status row. Displays a status icon (spinner for pending, check for confirmed, X for failed), a label, and a truncated hash that optionally links to a block explorer. The hash link, when present, is the only interactive element.

keyboard.action: Moves focus to the explorer link (if explorerUrl or href is provided).
Activates the link, opening the explorer in a new tab.

focus.notes: The link uses the default browser focus ring. Opens in a new tab via target="_blank" with rel="noopener noreferrer".

announcements: Reads the status label, then the truncated hash.
screenReader.notes: Status changes (pending → confirmed) are not announced automatically; the component re-renders silently when the `status` prop changes. If you need live announcements, wrap the page-level transaction flow in an aria-live region or dispatch a toast on status transitions.

contrast.text: Status label uses tone-specific colors (muted-foreground / emerald-600 / destructive) all of which meet WCAG AA on the default theme
contrast.ui: Link underline on hover ensures the link is distinguishable beyond color

motion.reducedMotion: Pending spinner animates continuously; consider pairing with prefers-reduced-motion handling at the app level if that matters for your audience

consumerResponsibilities: Pass the correct explorer URL for the chain; the component does not resolve it.
For long-running flows, pair TxStatus with a toast or live region so screen reader users are informed when the status changes.
Validate the hash format on your side; TxStatus renders whatever string you give it.
